issues.title: Incorrect table reference
issues.problem: The query references tables 'employees' and 'departments' which are not part of the provided schema.
issues.fix:
SELECT m.merchant_name, t.amount
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t
JOIN sigma_analytics.dim_merchant m ON t.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED';

issues.title: Missing filter for revenue calculation
issues.problem: The query does not filter transactions by status 'COMPLETED' to calculate revenue.

issues.title: Missing calculation for failure rate
issues.problem: The query does not calculate the failure rate as per the business rules.
issues.fix:
(SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'FAILED') * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS failure_rate
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t)

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the logic, especially for complex calculations.
issues.fix:
-- Calculate total revenue from completed transactions
SELECT SUM(t.amount) AS revenue
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED';

-- Calculate failure rate
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'FAILED') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t) AS failure_rate;

review.corrected_sql:
-- Calculate total revenue from completed transactions
SELECT SUM(t.amount) AS revenue
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t
WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED';

-- Calculate failure rate
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'FAILED') * 100.0 / COUNT(*)
FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions t) AS failure_rate;
review.summary: The query contained critical correctness issues by referencing non-existent tables and missing necessary filters. Readability was also lacking due to the absence of comments.
